FlexiPage.description: This is the default Opportunity Lightning Record Page for the Pursuit Management App.

componentInstanceProperties.name: richTextValue
componentInstanceProperties.value: ⚠️Please mark the opportunity stage as complete as the opportunity progresses.

componentInstanceProperties.name: richTextValue
componentInstanceProperties.value: ⚠️Please undertake a commercial review for projects over $2M

componentInstanceProperties.name: richTextValue
componentInstanceProperties.value: ⚠️This Opportunity has a nominal amount entered. Please verify accuracy or update the Amount field if this is a placeholder.

FlexiPage.masterLabel: Opportunity Record Page - Pursuit Management App
